title: Black Bow
description: Simple black retexture of the Minecraft bow and arrow. Dark, clean, and perfect for role-playing or PvP builds.
body:
![A screenshot of miencraft gameplay in a flat open biome with a first person view of the player pulling back a black bow to showcase the resource back and how it srecolors the bow and arrow to be black instead of the default brown.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c3c15753b70442578954f06314fb6d956781564_0.webp)
## 🏹 Black Bow Give your Minecraft bow a dark, clean look with this simple retexture. Black Bow replaces the vanilla bow textures with a solid black design for a minimal, sleek, and modern feel. Perfect for PvP, medieval worlds, or anyone who wants a sharper look without breaking Minecraft’s vanilla style. - 🏹 **Custom Bow Textures** – Standby and pulling stages in black - 🎨 **Vanilla-Friendly** – Keeps Minecraft’s original shape and feel - ⚔️ **Clean and Minimal** – Great for competitive players or dark fantasy builds - 💻 **Optimized** – Small file size and quick loading - ✅ **Updated for 26.1+** – Works with the latest Java versions
